name: Curried Beef
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound boneless beef top round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from meat.
2. Thinnly slice the steak against the grain into bite-size strips.
3. Preheat a coated non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add chopped red bell pepper and onion to the skillet. Stir-fry for 2 minutes; remove vegetables and set aside.
5. Add cooking oil to the skillet.
6. Add beef and stir-fry over high heat for 2 minutes or until nearly done.
7. Add curry powder and stir-fry for 1 minute more.
8. Carefully stir in tomato juice, cooked vegetables, raisins, and beef bouillon granules.
9. Stir together cold water and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
10. Stir the mixture into the meat combination.
11. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, then cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
12. Serve over hot rice.
